# Business — Generative Engine Optimization Map

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Dive into 600+ free unblocked games playable anywhere. No downloads, no restrictions—just pure gaming fun in your browser. Start playing now!

### Games
https://example.com/games
Explore our collection of 600+ free online browser games. From action to puzzles, poker to adventure—find your next favorite game and play instantly.

### About
https://example.com/about
Discover why thousands choose us for unblocked gaming. We&#39;re dedicated to providing free, accessible entertainment with 600+ games for every player.

### Contact
https://example.com/contact
Have questions or game requests? Contact our team today! We&#39;re here to enhance your online gaming experience and help you find the perfect game to play.

## Legal & Policy

### Privacy Policy
https://example.com/privacy
Information about how user data is collected, stored, and protected.

https://example.com/terms
Legal terms describing service usage, rights, and policies.

https://example.com/accessibility
Information about WCAG compliance and accessibility features.
